name: Daily Note
description: Write a short daily note and save it to storage. No hardware required.
goal: Write a short daily status note (2-3 sentences) summarizing that ClawWithTail is running normally, then save it using storage.save_summary with category='daily_note'. Finally, call storage.list_summaries with category='daily_note' and last_n=3 to confirm the save succeeded and show recent notes.
constraints: You MUST call storage.save_summary first, then storage.list_summaries to verify
The note content should mention the current date and that the system is operational
After calling storage.list_summaries and seeing the result, output your final answer immediately — do NOT call any more tools
